steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: Strip the parenthetical: "behavioral economists such as Gee, whose research focuses on charitable giving, ___ that..." The subject of the verb is behavioral economists — plural.

steps.title: Match subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Plural subject takes a plural present-tense verb: contend. "contends" and "is contending" are singular; "has contended" is also singular (and shifts tense unnecessarily).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
